title.en: China-to-Solomon Islands Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入所罗门群岛：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入索羅門群島：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Solomon Islands SISO standards context, Solomon Power / SIEA grid-connection review, IEC and Australia/New Zealand legacy practice, IEC 62109 safety evidence, IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence, IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 EMC evidence, 50 Hz 230/400 V operating settings, and tropical cyclone / humidity / salt-mist derating — versus China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与所罗门群岛SISO标准体系、Solomon Power / SIEA并网审查、IEC及澳新传统做法、IEC 62109安全证据、IEC 62116和IEC 61727并网接口证据、IEC 62920及IEC 61000 EMC证据、50 Hz 230/400 V运行参数，以及热带气旋、高湿和盐雾降额——对比中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與索羅門群島SISO標準體系、Solomon Power / SIEA併網審查、IEC及澳紐傳統做法、IEC 62109安全證據、IEC 62116和IEC 61727併網介面證據、IEC 62920及IEC 61000 EMC證據、50 Hz 230/400 V運行參數，以及熱帶氣旋、高濕和鹽霧降額——對比中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SISO standards determination, Solomon Power / SIEA grid-connection approval, customs determination, donor-project procurement approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Solomon Islands standards adoption, Solomon Power connection conditions, project-owner specifications, and coastal environmental design requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SISO标准适用裁定、Solomon Power / SIEA并网批准、海关裁定、援助项目采购批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行所罗门群岛标准采纳情况、Solomon Power接入条件、项目业主规格及沿海环境设计要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SISO標準適用裁定、Solomon Power / SIEA併網批准、海關裁定、援助項目採購批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行索羅門群島標準採納情況、Solomon Power接入條件、項目業主規格及沿海環境設計要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Solomon Islands, the key practical gaps are: (1) confirm the applicable SISO, Solomon Power / SIEA, donor-project, and IEC or AS/NZS-derived requirements for the specific project; (2) provide IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence for the exact inverter model or family; (3) provide IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence for grid-tied systems; (4) provide IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-series EMC evidence; (5) validate firmware and protection settings for Solomon Islands' 230/400 V, 50 Hz network. Solomon Islands has the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. Humidity, cyclone exposure, salt-mist corrosion, thermal derating, and sea-freight via Honiara should be addressed in the project technical file.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口所罗门群岛时，主要实际差距包括：（1）确认具体项目适用的SISO、Solomon Power / SIEA、援助项目以及IEC或源自AS/NZS的要求；（2）提供覆盖具体逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（3）为并网系统提供IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据；（4）提供IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列EMC证据；（5）针对所罗门群岛230/400 V、50 Hz电网验证固件和保护设置。所罗门群岛与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基准。项目技术文件还应覆盖高湿、气旋暴露、盐雾腐蚀、热降额及经霍尼亚拉海运的物流条件。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口索羅門群島時，主要實際差距包括：（1）確認具體項目適用的SISO、Solomon Power / SIEA、援助項目以及IEC或源自AS/NZS的要求；（2）提供覆蓋具體逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（3）為併網系統提供IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據；（4）提供IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列EMC證據；（5）針對索羅門群島230/400 V、50 Hz電網驗證韌體和保護設置。索羅門群島與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基準。項目技術文件還應覆蓋高濕、氣旋暴露、鹽霧腐蝕、熱降額及經霍尼亞拉海運的物流條件。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
